creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 191295
new port math/py-pandas-datareader

The pandas-datareader project was previously a part of pandas. It provides access to remote financial data directly into pandas data structures.

I created this in math to be with py-pandas. This project (currently?) only imports financial data so could be placed in finance as a main category instead of math.
